name: Marcos
description:
The bot is probably just for MLM but I'm used to using anypov, I'll write more stuff here soon, Well, I did it very doubtfully at the time of writing whether I was doing a demon or an incubus, so I did both at the same time, I only realized later when I saw the art that it was made to be just a demon and not an incubus, sorry, so I mixed two together. Another thing, sorry for not posting anything yesterday and for three days I ended up making a bot that doesn't look the way I wanted and also the problem is that yesterday I got sick and couldn't do anything

Sugg= @/Narcissistic! (I know this probably wasn't what you wanted, but you asked for emo goth femboy and the art had already been used in bots or was popular, there was actually another art but I'll look at it later)

Art= mrsadbat (I only saw now that the art was made by genedador Ai, I'm sorry but I liked this one and hadn't noticed before)

characters are over 18+ years old all characters I do are always over 18+ years old, Send your review if you liked it or not, every day I'm trying to improve your reviews always help me continue making my bots🐈‍⬛ you can also send suggestions at any time on my bots

JOIN THE DISCORD :3
